sections.title: Base
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Red Back #/299, Blue Back #/175, Blank Back #/50, Green Back #/40, No Name #/10, Full Name #/5. · TIMELESS TRIBUTES PARALLELS: Gold #/99, Orange #/25, Blue #/10, Black 1/1.

sections.title: Base Optichrome Premium Edition
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Red Back #/175, Blank Back #/35, No Name #/5, Full Name 1/1. · TIMELESS TRIBUTES PARALLELS: Gold #/65, Orange #/15, Blue #/5, Black 1/1.

sections.title: Base Significant Signatures
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Gold #/49 or less (No Garoppolo, Pettaway*), Orange #/25 or less (No Garoppolo, Baldwin*), Blue #/10 or less, Black 1/1. · *Lamar Jackson only in Orange/Blue/Black parallels.*

sections.title: Optichrome Premium Edition Significant Signatures
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Gold #/25 or less (No Wentz, Manning*), Orange #/10 or #/5 (No Butkus*), Blue #/5 or #/3, Black 1/1. · * Jim Kelly only in Orange parallel; Lamar Jackson only in Gold/Blue/Black parallels.*

sections.title: Classic Combos Signatures
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Gold #/20 or less (No Woodson, Reed*), Orange #/10 or less (No Woodson, Reed*), Blue #/5 or less, Black 1/1.
